---
title: "8. Wrapping up Stats Block 1"
author: "Johnny van Doorn"
date: "TODO 2026"
footer: "Scientific & Statistical Reasoning"
format:
  revealjs:
    output-ext: slide.html
    css: ../../ajohnson.css
  html: default
css: ../../ajohnson.css
---

<div class="goals">
In this lecture we discuss:

* Correlation
  * In JASP
* Linear model
  * In JASP
* Revisiting NHST
  * Alpha
  * Confidence intervals
    
<strong>Reading:</strong>
Chapters 1–8.8 (not Chapter 6)
</div>

# Closing

## Next Week

- Exam!
  - Mix of using JASP/interpreting output/conceptual understanding
  - Field book available (like in this weeks WA), including glossary
  - WA will contain old exam questions

## Recommended Exercises

- [Exercise 7.6](https://discoverjasp.com/pages/exercises#chapter-7)
- [Exercise 7.7](https://discoverjasp.com/pages/exercises#chapter-7)
- [Exercise 8.1](https://discoverjasp.com/pages/exercises#chapter-8)

```{r child="../../footer.qmd"}
```
